_comment: FALLBACK ONLY — DO NOT EDIT TO CHASE MONTHLY ROLLOVERS. The fields `underlying_symbol` and `underlying_security_id` (the FUT contract symbol + security id) are demoted to fallback values per Phase E7 / PY-119. At TFA startup `main._resolve_near_month_contract` queries Dhan's scrip-master for the nearest FUTCOM expiry and overrides these. The static value here is only used if scrip-master is unreachable. For MCX, BOTH the WS feed AND the chain-poller use the runtime-resolved id (Dhan's MCX optionchain API needs the current near-month FUTCOM contract id, not a stable spot id). Editing the FUT symbol string each month is unnecessary and confuses readers — leave it alone. This was the bug behind the 2026-04-21 CRUDEOIL halt; see memory `project_mcx_rollover_fix.md`.
